record_types.name: SPI_Peripheral

fields.name: SSPCR0
fields.description: Control register 1, SSPCR1 on page 3-5

fields.name: SSPCR1
fields.description: Data register, SSPDR on page 3-6

fields.name: SSPDR
fields.description: Status register, SSPSR on page 3-7

fields.name: SSPSR
fields.description: Clock prescale register, SSPCPSR on page 3-8

fields.name: SSPCPSR
fields.description: Interrupt mask set or clear register, SSPIMSC on page 3-9

fields.name: SSPIMSC
fields.description: Raw interrupt status register, SSPRIS on page 3-10

fields.name: SSPRIS
fields.description: Masked interrupt status register, SSPMIS on page 3-11

fields.name: SSPMIS
fields.description: Interrupt clear register, SSPICR on page 3-11

fields.name: SSPICR
fields.description: DMA control register, SSPDMACR on page 3-12

fields.name: SSPDMACR
fields.description: Peripheral identification registers, SSPPeriphID0-3 on page 3-13

fields.name: SSPPERIPHID0
fields.description: Peripheral identification registers, SSPPeriphID0-3 on page 3-13

fields.name: SSPPERIPHID1
fields.description: Peripheral identification registers, SSPPeriphID0-3 on page 3-13

fields.name: SSPPERIPHID2
fields.description: Peripheral identification registers, SSPPeriphID0-3 on page 3-13

fields.name: SSPPERIPHID3
fields.description: PrimeCell identification registers, SSPPCellID0-3 on page 3-16

fields.name: SSPPCELLID0
fields.description: PrimeCell identification registers, SSPPCellID0-3 on page 3-16

fields.name: SSPPCELLID1
fields.description: PrimeCell identification registers, SSPPCellID0-3 on page 3-16

fields.name: SSPPCELLID2
fields.description: PrimeCell identification registers, SSPPCellID0-3 on page 3-16

record_types.name: SSPCPSR_Register

fields.name: CPSDVSR
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPCR0_Register

fields.name: DSS
fields.description:
Frame format: 00 Motorola SPI frame format. 01 TI synchronous serial
frame format. 10 National Microwire frame format. 11 Reserved,
undefined operation.

fields.name: FRF
fields.description:
SSPCLKOUT polarity, applicable to Motorola SPI frame format only. See
Motorola SPI frame format on page 2-10.

fields.name: SPO
fields.description:
SSPCLKOUT phase, applicable to Motorola SPI frame format only. See
Motorola SPI frame format on page 2-10.

fields.name: SPH
fields.description:
Serial clock rate. The value SCR is used to generate the transmit and
receive bit rate of the PrimeCell SSP. The bit rate is: F SSPCLK
CPSDVSR x (1+SCR) where CPSDVSR is an even value from 2-254,
programmed through the SSPCPSR register and SCR is a value from
0-255.

fields.name: SCR
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPCR1_Register

fields.name: LBM
fields.description:
Synchronous serial port enable: 0 SSP operation disabled. 1 SSP
operation enabled.

fields.name: SSE
fields.description:
Master or slave mode select. This bit can be modified only when the
PrimeCell SSP is disabled, SSE=0: 0 Device configured as master,
default. 1 Device configured as slave.

fields.name: MS
fields.description:
Slave-mode output disable. This bit is relevant only in the slave
mode, MS=1. In multiple-slave systems, it is possible for an
PrimeCell SSP master to broadcast a message to all slaves in the
system while ensuring that only one slave drives data onto its serial
output line. In such systems the RXD lines from multiple slaves could
be tied together. To operate in such systems, the SOD bit can be set
if the PrimeCell SSP slave is not supposed to drive the SSPTXD line:
0 SSP can drive the SSPTXD output in slave mode. 1 SSP must not drive
the SSPTXD output in slave mode.

fields.name: SOD
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPDMACR_Register

fields.name: RXDMAE
fields.description:
Transmit DMA Enable. If this bit is set to 1, DMA for the transmit
FIFO is enabled.

fields.name: TXDMAE
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPDR_Register

fields.name: DATA
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPICR_Register

fields.name: RORIC
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Clears the SSPRTINTR interrupt

fields.name: RTIC
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPIMSC_Register

fields.name: RORIM
fields.description:
Receive timeout interrupt mask: 0 Receive FIFO not empty and no read
prior to timeout period interrupt is masked. 1 Receive FIFO not empty
and no read prior to timeout period interrupt is not masked.

fields.name: RTIM
fields.description:
Receive FIFO interrupt mask: 0 Receive FIFO half full or less
condition interrupt is masked. 1 Receive FIFO half full or less
condition interrupt is not masked.

fields.name: RXIM
fields.description:
Transmit FIFO interrupt mask: 0 Transmit FIFO half empty or less
condition interrupt is masked. 1 Transmit FIFO half empty or less
condition interrupt is not masked.

fields.name: TXIM
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPMIS_Register

fields.name: RORMIS
fields.description:
Read-only. Gives the receive timeout masked interrupt state, after
masking, of the SSPRTINTR interrupt

fields.name: RTMIS
fields.description:
Read-only. Gives the receive FIFO masked interrupt state, after
masking, of the SSPRXINTR interrupt

fields.name: RXMIS
fields.description:
Read-only. Gives the transmit FIFO masked interrupt state, after
masking, of the SSPTXINTR interrupt

fields.name: TXMIS
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPPCELLID0_Register

fields.name: SSPPCELLID0
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPPCELLID1_Register

fields.name: SSPPCELLID1
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPPCELLID2_Register

fields.name: SSPPCELLID2
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPPCELLID3_Register

fields.name: SSPPCELLID3
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPPERIPHID0_Register

fields.name: PARTNUMBER0
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPPERIPHID1_Register

fields.name: PARTNUMBER1
fields.description: Read-only. These bits read back as 0x1

fields.name: DESIGNER0
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPPERIPHID2_Register

fields.name: DESIGNER1
fields.description: Read-only. These bits return the peripheral revision

fields.name: REVISION
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPPERIPHID3_Register

fields.name: CONFIGURATION
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPRIS_Register

fields.name: RORRIS
fields.description:
Read-only. Gives the raw interrupt state, prior to masking, of the
SSPRTINTR interrupt

fields.name: RTRIS
fields.description:
Read-only. Gives the raw interrupt state, prior to masking, of the
SSPRXINTR interrupt

fields.name: RXRIS
fields.description:
Read-only. Gives the raw interrupt state, prior to masking, of the
SSPTXINTR interrupt

fields.name: TXRIS
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: SSPSR_Register

fields.name: TFE
fields.description:
Read-only. Transmit FIFO not full, RO: 0 Transmit FIFO is full. 1
Transmit FIFO is not full.

fields.name: TNF
fields.description:
Read-only. Receive FIFO not empty, RO: 0 Receive FIFO is empty. 1
Receive FIFO is not empty.

fields.name: RNE
fields.description:
Read-only. Receive FIFO full, RO: 0 Receive FIFO is not full. 1
Receive FIFO is full.

fields.name: RFF
fields.description:
Read-only. PrimeCell SSP busy flag, RO: 0 SSP is idle. 1 SSP is
currently transmitting and/or receiving a frame or the transmit FIFO
is not empty.

fields.name: BSY
fields.description: unspecified

variables.name: SPI0_Periph
variables.code:
SPI0_Periph : aliased SPI_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => SPI0_Base;

variables.name: SPI1_Periph
variables.code:
SPI1_Periph : aliased SPI_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => SPI1_Base;
